---
# Canonical report template for /order.code-check.
orderspec:
  artifact: gate_report
  command: "order.code-check"
  model: "{model_name}"
  generated_at: "{DATE}"
  verdict: "{VERDICT}"
  assurance: "{ASSURANCE}"
  terminal_precondition: {TERMINAL_PRECONDITION}
  feature_id: "{FEATURE_ID}"
  feature_directory: "{FEATURE_DIR_REL}"
---

<!-- code-report.md — generated by /order.code-check · {DATE} · verdict: {VERDICT} · overwritten each run -->

## Code Check (implementation — code ↔ contract)

**Verdict**: {VERDICT}
**Assurance**: {ASSURANCE}
**Scope**: {SCOPE}
**Evidence mode**: {EVIDENCE_MODE}
**Target stability**: {TARGET_STABILITY}
**Plan**: {PLAN_STATE}
**Tests**: {TEST_STATE}
**Build**: {BUILD_STATE}

### Assurance Limits
{assurance_limits}

### Routing Required
{routing_rows}

### Findings
| ID | Source | Severity | Result | Disposition | Owner | Location ↔ Obligation | Evidence |
|----|--------|----------|--------|-------------|-------|-----------------------|----------|
| {findings_rows} |

### Coverage Exceptions
<!-- Render only VIOLATED, UNPROVEN, or NOT_CHECKED obligations. Use (none) when empty. -->
| Obligation | Priority | Result | Evidence | Implementation | Reason |
|------------|----------|--------|----------|----------------|--------|
| {coverage_exception_rows} |

### Evidence Execution
| Kind | Command | Exit | Summary |
|------|---------|------|---------|
| {evidence_execution_rows} |

### Metrics
- Obligations assessed: {obligations_assessed}
- Results: SATISFIED={satisfied_count} · VIOLATED={violated_count} · UNPROVEN={unproven_count} · NOT_CHECKED={not_checked_count}
- Findings by severity: CRITICAL={critical_count} · HIGH={high_count} · MEDIUM={medium_count} · LOW={low_count}
- Routing by owner: {routing_summary}
- Report file: {report_path}
